THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLINDRES, FRANKLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CHEESECAKE FACTORY RESTAURANTS, INC $260.80 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.80, COURT RECOMMENDS IF JUDGMENT IS TO BE PAID DEFENDANT SHALL CONTACT PLAINTIFF TO COME TO COME PICK UP CHECK IN SAN FRANCISCO.
